channel.title: The Manage Her® — Episode Show Notes
channel.description: Show-notes companion feed for The Manage Her® Podcast. Each item links to the full episode page with transcript, key takeaways, and guest links. Subscribe in Apple Podcasts/Spotify for audio.

image.title: The Manage Her® — Episode Show Notes

item.title: The Real Truth About Peptide Therapy: What Every Woman Needs to Know
item.description: Dr. Emily Passic reveals the truth about peptide therapy for women: what works, what's dangerous, and how to avoid the gray market risks.
item.itunes:title: The Real Truth About Peptide Therapy: What Every Woman Needs to Know
item.itunes:summary: Dr. Emily Passic reveals the truth about peptide therapy for women: what works, what's dangerous, and how to avoid the gray market risks.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: The Truth About Peptides: A Tired Mom's Guide to Real Energy
item.description: Discover the truth about peptides for tired moms. Tara Turnure shares her journey from depletion to energy with science-backed wellness solutions.
item.itunes:title: The Truth About Peptides: A Tired Mom's Guide to Real Energy
item.itunes:summary: Discover the truth about peptides for tired moms. Tara Turnure shares her journey from depletion to energy with science-backed wellness solutions.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: Why Corporate America Fails Working Mothers (And How to Fix It)
item.description: Why the 9-to-5 fails working mothers + how to redesign your career. Cassie Leonard shares insights on invisible labor, matrescence & leadership.
item.itunes:title: Why Corporate America Fails Working Mothers (And How to Fix It)
item.itunes:summary: Why the 9-to-5 fails working mothers + how to redesign your career. Cassie Leonard shares insights on invisible labor, matrescence & leadership.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: The Science Behind Why High-Achieving Women Get Stuck in Failure Loops
item.description: Why high-achieving women get stuck in failure loops + the 3 mindset shifts to bounce back stronger. Research-backed insights from Wharton coach.
item.itunes:title: The Science Behind Why High-Achieving Women Get Stuck in Failure Loops
item.itunes:summary: Why high-achieving women get stuck in failure loops + the 3 mindset shifts to bounce back stronger. Research-backed insights from Wharton coach.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: From Corporate Executive to Sound Healer: One Woman's Journey Through Grief
item.description: Former AWS executive Marcie Dean shares how devastating loss led her to discover frequency healing music and build a business channeling sound therapy.
item.itunes:title: From Corporate Executive to Sound Healer: One Woman's Journey Through Grief
item.itunes:summary: Former AWS executive Marcie Dean shares how devastating loss led her to discover frequency healing music and build a business channeling sound therapy.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: The Male Fertility Crisis No One Talks About (Plus the Truth About Pregnancy After 35)
item.description: Former Nike exec Vida Delrahim exposes the male fertility crisis, debunks pregnancy myths after 35, and reveals why trimester zero matters most for conception.
item.itunes:title: The Male Fertility Crisis No One Talks About (Plus the Truth About Pregnancy After 35)
item.itunes:summary: Former Nike exec Vida Delrahim exposes the male fertility crisis, debunks pregnancy myths after 35, and reveals why trimester zero matters most for conception.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: Why Perfectionism Is Sabotaging Your Work-Life Balance (And What to Do Instead)
item.description: Discover why perfectionism kills work-life balance for ambitious women and learn the core strength approach that prevents burnout.
item.itunes:title: Why Perfectionism Is Sabotaging Your Work-Life Balance (And What to Do Instead)
item.itunes:summary: Discover why perfectionism kills work-life balance for ambitious women and learn the core strength approach that prevents burnout.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: Real Estate Investing Strategies That Generate $1,000+ Monthly Cashflow
item.description: Learn real estate investing strategies that generate $1,000+ monthly cashflow. Discover lease options, syndications & tax loopholes most investors miss.
item.itunes:title: Real Estate Investing Strategies That Generate $1,000+ Monthly Cashflow
item.itunes:summary: Learn real estate investing strategies that generate $1,000+ monthly cashflow. Discover lease options, syndications & tax loopholes most investors miss.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: Why Parenting and Leadership Are the Same Skill Set (According to a Psychologist)
item.description: Clinical psychologist Dr. Andrea Mata explains why parenting and leadership are the same skills, authoritative parenting vs gentle parenting.
item.itunes:title: Why Parenting and Leadership Are the Same Skill Set (According to a Psychologist)
item.itunes:summary: Clinical psychologist Dr. Andrea Mata explains why parenting and leadership are the same skills, authoritative parenting vs gentle parenting.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: Why Self-Care Isn't Selfish: Dr. Laura Brayton on Holistic Motherhood
item.description: Dr. Laura Brayton shares why self-care is mandatory for moms, chiropractic care benefits in pregnancy, and preconception detox essentials.
item.itunes:title: Why Self-Care Isn't Selfish: Dr. Laura Brayton on Holistic Motherhood
item.itunes:summary: Dr. Laura Brayton shares why self-care is mandatory for moms, chiropractic care benefits in pregnancy, and preconception detox essentials.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: Why Parenting Is Leadership (And How to Stop Doing Everything Yourself)
item.description: Parenting coach Kristina Campos shares why parenting is leadership, how to raise independent kids, and the long game strategy that transforms families.
item.itunes:title: Why Parenting Is Leadership (And How to Stop Doing Everything Yourself)
item.itunes:summary: Parenting coach Kristina Campos shares why parenting is leadership, how to raise independent kids, and the long game strategy that transforms families.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: Why Modern Women Are 'Out of Balance' and How to Return to Your Feminine Nature
item.description: Discover why modern women are 'out of balance' and Chelsea Ann's path back to feminine nature, healing burnout and reconnecting with intuition.
item.itunes:title: Why Modern Women Are 'Out of Balance' and How to Return to Your Feminine Nature
item.itunes:summary: Discover why modern women are 'out of balance' and Chelsea Ann's path back to feminine nature, healing burnout and reconnecting with intuition.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: From Frustrated Mom to Political Candidate: When Parental Rights Meet Leadership
item.description: Mom turns COVID education frustrations into CA State Senate run. Kristina Irwin's journey from write-in candidate to 2026 official ballot.
item.itunes:title: From Frustrated Mom to Political Candidate: When Parental Rights Meet Leadership
item.itunes:summary: Mom turns COVID education frustrations into CA State Senate run. Kristina Irwin's journey from write-in candidate to 2026 official ballot.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: From Divorce to Six-Figure Success: How One Mom Rewrote Her Financial Story
item.description: Discover how Tiana Reeves transformed divorce and corporate burnout into financial independence and success through the Corporate Mom Movement.
item.itunes:title: From Divorce to Six-Figure Success: How One Mom Rewrote Her Financial Story
item.itunes:summary: Discover how Tiana Reeves transformed divorce and corporate burnout into financial independence and success through the Corporate Mom Movement.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: The $10 Trillion Job Every Mother Does for Free (And Why It's Time to Name It)
item.description: Discover why the invisible workload of motherhood is worth $10 trillion and how naming this unpaid labor transforms overwhelm into empowerment.
item.itunes:title: The $10 Trillion Job Every Mother Does for Free (And Why It's Time to Name It)
item.itunes:summary: Discover why the invisible workload of motherhood is worth $10 trillion and how naming this unpaid labor transforms overwhelm into empowerment.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: Why Intentional Relationships Are the Ultimate Business Strategy
item.description: Learn why intentional relationship building beats every business strategy. Scott MacGregor shares his proven methods for authentic connections.
item.itunes:title: Why Intentional Relationships Are the Ultimate Business Strategy
item.itunes:summary: Learn why intentional relationship building beats every business strategy. Scott MacGregor shares his proven methods for authentic connections.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: How One Mom's 'Silly' Trivia Business Became a Community Empire
item.description: Discover how Christina Wooldridge built Trivia Goat into a community-centered business while being a working mom. Hospitality meets entrepreneurship.
item.itunes:title: How One Mom's 'Silly' Trivia Business Became a Community Empire
item.itunes:summary: Discover how Christina Wooldridge built Trivia Goat into a community-centered business while being a working mom. Hospitality meets entrepreneurship.

item.title: 50 Years Behind the Camera: What Media Insiders Don't Want You to Know
item.description: Legendary broadcaster Steve Edwards reveals 50 years of media industry secrets, career longevity tips, and why gratitude is your superpower.

item.title: Why Writing Your Book Alone Is Holding You Back: The Power of Book Midwives
item.description: Discover why writing your book alone is holding you back. Learn the embodied approach to authorship that's changing how women write and publish their stories.

item.itunes:summary: Discover why writing your book alone is holding you back. Learn the embodied approach to authorship that's changing how women write and publish their stories.

item.title: How Love and Oneness Unlock Million-Dollar Business Success with Dave Lundgren
item.description: Dave Lundgren shares how Love and Oneness universal laws drive billion-dollar business success, plus insights on AI, real estate, and conscious leadership.

item.itunes:summary: Dave Lundgren shares how Love and Oneness universal laws drive billion-dollar business success, plus insights on AI, real estate, and conscious leadership.

item.title: Why 6,988 Pages of the Tax Code Are Written to Help You Pay Less
item.description: Learn why only 12 pages of tax code tell you what to pay while 6,988 pages show you how to pay less. Tax strategy tips for women entrepreneurs.
item.itunes:title: Why 6,988 Pages of the Tax Code Are Written to Help You Pay Less
item.itunes:summary: Learn why only 12 pages of tax code tell you what to pay while 6,988 pages show you how to pay less. Tax strategy tips for women entrepreneurs.

item.title: 3 Steps to Transform Your Family's Health Without Overwhelm (From a Mom Expert)
item.description: Learn Julie E's 3-step framework to manage your family's health: biofield protection, detox support, and healing scars that block wellness.

item.title: The Money Story That's Costing Women Millions (And How to Rewrite It)
item.description: Discover the 4 money stories formed by age 7 that shape your financial decisions. Learn why the investing gap costs women more than the wage gap.

item.title: How One Mom With Brain Injury Fought CA Laws Denying 50K Kids School Access
item.description: Amy Bohn overcame brain injury to lead PERK's fight for 50K California kids denied school access. A mom's journey from recovery to advocacy.

item.title: How a 26-Year-Old Single Mom Is Crushing It in Tech: Hannah White's Story
item.description: Single mom Hannah White shares how she's thriving in tech at 26, balancing motherhood and career with practical strategies for modern working mothers.
item.itunes:title: How a 26-Year-Old Single Mom Is Crushing It in Tech: Hannah White's Story
item.itunes:summary: Single mom Hannah White shares how she's thriving in tech at 26, balancing motherhood and career with practical strategies for modern working mothers.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: How to Build Stronger Relationships Through Emotional Wellness and Boundaries
item.description: Expert therapist Vanessa Morgan shares actionable advice on emotional wellness, boundaries, and building stronger relationships for women leaders.
item.itunes:title: How to Build Stronger Relationships Through Emotional Wellness and Boundaries
item.itunes:summary: Expert therapist Vanessa Morgan shares actionable advice on emotional wellness, boundaries, and building stronger relationships for women leaders.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: How Intuitive Leadership Transforms Motherhood and Business Success
item.description: Discover how intuitive leadership transforms business and motherhood with Nikki Bostwick, founder of The Fullest, on The Manage Her podcast.
item.itunes:title: How Intuitive Leadership Transforms Motherhood and Business Success
item.itunes:summary: Discover how intuitive leadership transforms business and motherhood with Nikki Bostwick, founder of The Fullest, on The Manage Her podcast.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus

item.title: How to Build Your Own Table When There's No Seat for You in Leadership
item.description: Neetu Sadhwani shares how she built her own table in leadership, overcame burnout, and found the courage to chase purpose over comfort on The Manage Her podcast.
item.itunes:title: How to Build Your Own Table When There's No Seat for You in Leadership
item.itunes:summary: Neetu Sadhwani shares how she built her own table in leadership, overcame burnout, and found the courage to chase purpose over comfort on The Manage Her podcast.
item.itunes:author: Aimee Rickabus
